name: release-with-testing
description: Full release workflow with automated testing (Firebase Test Lab, Pre-launch Report). Only proceeds to release if all tests pass.

steps.name: check_apk_exists
steps.description: Check if APK exists for Firebase Test Lab (fallback to AAB if not)
steps.command: if [ -f '${env.APK_PATH}' ]; then echo 'APK found for testing'; else echo 'APK not found, will extract from AAB if needed'; fi

steps.name: firebase_robo_test
steps.description: Run Firebase Test Lab robo tests (UI crawler)

steps.name: firebase_instrumentation_test
steps.description: Run Firebase Test Lab instrumentation tests if test APK exists

steps.name: check_firebase_results
steps.description: Check Firebase Test Lab results and calculate pass rate
steps.command: echo 'Firebase Test Lab Results:' && if [ '${steps.firebase_robo_test.outcome}' = 'success' ]; then echo 'Robo tests: PASSED'; else echo 'Robo tests: FAILED'; fi && if [ -f '${env.TEST_APK_PATH}' ]; then if [ '${steps.firebase_instrumentation_test.outcome}' = 'success' ]; then echo 'Instrumentation tests: PASSED'; else echo 'Instrumentation tests: FAILED (non-blocking)'; fi; fi

steps.name: halt_on_firebase_failure
steps.description: Stop if Firebase tests failed critically
steps.command: if [ '${steps.firebase_robo_test.outcome}' != 'success' ]; then echo 'Firebase robo tests failed. Aborting release.' && exit 1; else echo 'Firebase tests passed - proceeding'; fi

steps.name: upload_for_prelaunch
steps.description: Upload AAB to Google Play for pre-launch report

steps.name: wait_for_prelaunch
steps.description: Wait for pre-launch report to complete

steps.name: check_prelaunch_results
steps.command: echo 'Pre-launch Report Results:' && echo 'Tests Run: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsRun}' && echo 'Passed: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsPassed}' && echo 'Failed: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsFailed}' && if [ ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsFailed} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Status: PASSED'; else echo 'Status: FAILED - Issues detected'; fi

steps.name: check_prelaunch_issues
steps.description: Check for critical issues in pre-launch report
steps.command: echo 'Checking pre-launch report for critical issues...' && if [ ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsFailed} -gt 0 ]; then echo 'WARNING: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsFailed} test(s) failed' && echo 'Review issues before proceeding'; fi

steps.name: commit_edit_after_prelaunch
steps.description: Commit the edit after pre-launch report processing

steps.name: upload_release_bundle
steps.description: Upload final release bundle (re-upload for clean release)

steps.name: release_to_track
steps.description: Release to specified track after all tests passed

steps.name: generate_test_summary
steps.description: Generate summary of all tests performed
steps.command: echo '========================================' && echo 'RELEASE WITH TESTING - SUMMARY' && echo '========================================' && echo 'Package: ${env.PACKAGE}' && echo 'Version Code: ${steps.upload_release_bundle.versionCode}' && echo 'Release Track: ${env.RELEASE_TRACK}' && echo '' && echo 'Tests Performed:' && if [ '${env.SKIP_FIREBASE_TESTS}' != 'true' ]; then echo '  Firebase Test Lab:' && echo '    - Robo Tests: ${steps.firebase_robo_test.outcome}' && if [ -f '${env.TEST_APK_PATH}' ]; then echo '    - Instrumentation: ${steps.firebase_instrumentation_test.outcome:-N/A}'; fi; fi && if [ '${env.SKIP_PRELAUNCH}' != 'true' ]; then echo '  Pre-launch Report:' && echo '    - Tests Run: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsRun}' && echo '    - Passed: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsPassed}' && echo '    - Failed: ${steps.wait_for_prelaunch.testsFailed}'; fi && echo '' && echo 'Release Status: COMPLETED' && echo '========================================'

steps.name: notify_release_complete
steps.description: Notify team about successful test-verified release
steps.command: echo 'Release ${steps.upload_release_bundle.versionCode} has been successfully deployed to ${env.RELEASE_TRACK} after passing all automated tests.'
